reviews.review_description:
Left the original review just so you're aware of a possible error, but raised the score. Got it working! I love this! It's whimsical and light. A bit of stress but not too much. I'd suggest a level generator (because I can see a few of the... Uh... surprises? Losing their flair quick) and a difficulty slider. I was able to complete a level alone, for example. But otherwise, is such a nice little game. Was disappointed when I tried to fly to the tree (even though I knew it was the skybox) but otherwise, very cool. I dig the whole thing. My last suggestion would be artificial turning. A lot of people I know play vr after long days at work, and standing to play games as an option is super beneficial for people like us. Otherwise, keep on! Fantastic little game. I mostly play shooter games, BTW, so this is out of my wheel house, but I'm going to see if I can't get some of my vr buddies to join me for a match. 

Ideally, eventually you could build this into a "the raft" kinda game, because the balloon would make that so fresh, but what it is now is wonderful too. 😊

Loaded it up to muck about with, but the single player wasn't functioning? Maybe I have to have a team to play? Lovely world yall built though. It took me a minute in the menu to realize the sun was setting, so I just sat down on my bed and enjoyed the sunset. Very coo. Love the skybox and the day night cycle. Hopefully I can sort out a few mates to play with and maybe give it a go, 'cause I love the direction this is headed
